documents_kind_payload.name: documents_kind_payload
documents_kind_payload.value: ("documents"."kind" = 'upload' AND "documents"."file_key" IS NOT NULL AND "documents"."url" IS NULL) OR ("documents"."kind" = 'link' AND "documents"."url" IS NOT NULL AND "documents"."file_key" IS NULL)

documents_attached_to_something.name: documents_attached_to_something
documents_attached_to_something.value: "documents"."vehicle_id" IS NOT NULL OR "documents"."expense_id" IS NOT NULL
